summary: Frontend testing of 3 NEW changes on Dejavoo Terminals page. ALL 10 TEST ITEMS VERIFIED WORKING.

free_placement_disclosure_below_dual_pri.feature_tested: Free Placement disclosure text below Dual Pricing percentages in rate cards section

testimonial_1_jason.quote: Switched from Bank of America and haven't looked back. MSC's team is great, always available.

testimonial_2_linda.quote: The subscription includes everything—hardware, SIM, and software. No surprises. One flat cost every month and no credit card fees.

testimonial_3_brianna.feature_tested: Testimonial 3: Brianna G., New York, NY
testimonial_3_brianna.quote: Setup was quick, and the support team was amazing. Our salon runs on the QD4 now.

terminal_cards_free_placement_button.feature_tested: All 8 terminal cards show 'Free Placement' button (not 'Pricing')

free_placement_modal_title.feature_tested: Clicking 'Free Placement' opens modal titled '[Terminal Name] - Free Placement'
examples_verified: P8 Smart Wireless Terminal - Free Placement

free_placement_modal_dual_and_flat_rate.feature_tested: Modal shows Dual Pricing (0% merchant, 4% cardholder) and Flat Rate (2.69% + $0.10) options

free_placement_modal_disclosure.feature_tested: Free Placement modal includes disclosure text at the bottom
free_placement_modal_disclosure.disclosure_content: All equipment comes with a limited warranty for the term of the agreement of 36 months. All free placements are subject to a $99 annual fee and a $5k minimum monthly volume.

apply_now_opens_activation_popup.feature_tested: Clicking 'Apply Now' in Free Placement modal closes it and opens 'Activation & Shipping Deposit' popup
apply_now_opens_activation_popup.result: PASS - Both Apply Now buttons open activation popup

modal_no_stale_data_regression.feature_tested: Modal shows correct terminal name for different terminals (no stale data)

critical_code_review_comments: DejavooTerminals.jsx: All 3 requested changes implemented correctly
Terminal buttons correctly show 'Free Placement' instead of 'Pricing' (line 547)
PricingModalContent correctly shows terminal name with 'Free Placement' suffix (line 131)
Modal includes disclosure text in gray box at bottom (lines 191-194)
Apply Now buttons trigger activation popup via setShowActivation(true) (lines 154, 182)
Activation popup has all required content including jotform link
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 NEW changes verified on /pos/dejavoo-terminals page. The complete flow works: Free Placement button → pricing modal with disclosure → Apply Now → activation deposit popup → Continue Activation (jotform link). No stale data issues - controlled Dialog pattern works correctly.
